title: Snopake 76 x 76 mm Neon Assorted Sticky Notes [Cube of 450 Sheets] 11702, Neon/Assorted Colours
features: Snopake’s bright and vibrant Neon Sticky Notes will get your message noticed, with premium quality sheets sticking to almost any surface
Use the handy Sticky Notes to capture an idea, make lists, write important notes, bookmark pages and write quick reminders
Medium size notes are ideal for placing on your desk or by your phone, ensuring you always have a note to hand
Each sheet can be removed and repositioned without losing its’ stickiness or leaving behind any unwanted residue, with more adhesive than standard sticky notes for a better stick
Snopake uses top quality materials for its Sticky Notes, without endangering forests. Snopake proudly carry the FSC logo to show that their materials come from sustainable forests
Measuring 76 x 76 mm, each individually wrapped cube consist of 450 sheets of high quality Sticky Note paper, perfect for writing all your important notes
description: From the manufacturer Snopake Notes and Tabs are a must have in the home, school or workplace. From leaving reminders on desks or around the home, it’s always useful to have a pad of Snopake Sticky Notes to hand. Each Sticky Note is produced to Snopake’s highest standard, ensuring you get the best possible product. Our Sticky Notes can be easily removed whilst retaining their stickiness, so you can reposition them over and over again. Our brightly coloured Index Tabs are also an essential accessory, from highlighting text to revision page marking to emphasising those small yet important notes, our range of Index Tabs are handy to all. Snopake's Neon Sticky Notes are useful to all. Ideal for use in the home, school or workplace, our handy notes will stick to most surfaces, including papers, desks and even your fridge. Made to Snopake’s highest standard, each pad consists of 450 quality sheets of paper, while proudly carrying the FSC TM logo, ensuring our materials come from sustainable forests. You can use the convenient Sticky Notes to leave messages on your desk, notes on your revision pages and important reminders around the home. Each sheet can be easily removed to stick on a variety of surfaces without leaving behind any unwanted residue. Worry not – the notes retain enough stickiness to be re-positioned again and again, ensuring those important reminders are always to hand. The Neon Sticky Notes come in a variety of sizes and are also available in two Neon Assorted colour choices – they’ll be sure to brighten up any space! Snopake's Neon Sticky Notes are produced to Snopake's highest standards. Each cube is made up of 450 top quality sheets of sticky paper, which conveniently stick to most surfaces. Snopake's Notes and Tabs can be easily removed, leaving no unwanted residue behind, yet retain their stickiness so you can reposition each note or tab a number of times. Snopake uses top quality materials for all our Notes and Tabs without endangering forests. We proudly carry the FSC TM logo to show that our materials come from sustainable forests.
